channel.title: SSbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: WATCH: Disney brings 'Toy Story 5' to children's hospitals
item.description: Disney and Pixar partnered with the Starlight Children's Foundation to screen 'Toy Story 5' at 300 children's hospitals nationwide.

item.title: Schiff initiates inquiry into DOJ's closure of tainted baby formula investigation
item.description: Senator Adam Schiff has started a congressional probe into why the Justice Department ended a long-running criminal investigation into bacteria-contaminated baby formula.

item.title: Palm Beach Airport in South Florida renamed after President Donald J. Trump
item.description: An airport in South Florida has been officially renamed the President Donald J. Trump International Airport.

item.title: Qatari official says US-Iran strikes threaten key parts of regional MOU
item.description: A senior Qatari official stated that renewed U.S.-Iran hostilities raise doubts about elements of the MOU signed by regional nations last month.
